calendar.matters:
Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Dec-23-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Dahm, Esq. 415-989-4730 of Cook Collections Attorneys PLC for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Counsel stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR CO OF SAN FRANCISCO, LLC's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

No opposition. Motion granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-17-2019 Continued To Dec-26-19 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Madison Farms LLC, a California limited liability Company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Ryan Dahm, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Enterprise Rent-A-Car Co. of San Francisco LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
No appearance by defendant Madison Farms LLC, a California limited liability Company.
Plaintiff's complaint for Services Unpaid Charges for the Lease, Rental and Use to Rolling Stock, and Breach of the Rental Agreement, was filed on March 25, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant Madison Farms LLC, a California limited liability Company, occurred on April 1, 2019, and was effectuated on April 12, 2019.
Default as to defendant Madison Farms LLC, a California limited liability company, was entered on May 17, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 18, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Enterprise Rent-A-Car Co. of San Francisco LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Madison Farms LLC, a California limited liability Company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $59,539.09.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,316.02.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $535.00.

Total - $63,390.11.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Continued To Dec-04-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
